calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Monica R. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Katy Bersamin, #11722.

Thomas Ray, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Company.
Dennis Field, fire cause analyst, and Mary Sutton, claims adjustor, were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Susan Wells.
Default was entered against defendant on January 11, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 28, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Susan Wells as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,635.630.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $176,601.34.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $569.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,812,800.84.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
